meme.title: Cat pretend to eat phone cord with noise and everything. (Turn your sound up)

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “it's just a cat"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: ‏I don’t see any cats here only a bunny
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Markets React To: Bro really thought I wouldn’t find him 💀🐾
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: BREAKING: “I think i packed the right instrument”
headlines.b: Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-06)
